diagrams.title: Email System Architecture
diagrams.description: Complete email system showing flow from sender to recipient through all components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how email travels from sender to recipient through various agents and protocols

diagrams.title: SMTP Transaction Flow
diagrams.description: Sequence diagram showing SMTP commands and responses between client and server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how SMTP establishes connection and transfers email messages with command-response pattern

diagrams.title: Email Message Structure (RFC 822)
diagrams.description: Structure of a standard email showing headers and body format
elements: From, To, Subject, Date, CC, BCC fields
diagrams.purpose: Understanding email format, header fields, and separation between headers and body
